/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/object_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_detection_msgs/msg/detail/detection__description.c.o CMakeFiles/object_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_detection_msgs/msg/detail/detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/object_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_detection_msgs/msg/detail/detection__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
